title: Joint inspections crackdown on illegal HMOs
summary: Coventry City Council’s Safer Housing and Communities team, along with partners, have carried out a series of targeted enforcement visits across the city.

title: Barry named Coventry’s latest Good Citizen
summary: Barry Price has been honoured with Coventry’s Good Citizen Award for his incredible fundraising efforts for local charities.

title: Victorious Sky Blues awarded Honorary Freedom of the City
summary: Coventry City FC has been awarded the Honorary Freedom of the City in recognition of its promotion back to the Premier League and outstanding contribution to the life of the city.

title: Coventry Launches “Best Start in Life” Strategy to Improve Outcomes for Children and Families
summary: Coventry City Council, in partnership with key local organisations, is proud to announce the launch of its “Best Start in Life” Strategy.

title: Homegrown talent and national stars come together for Godiva in the City
summary: David Rodigan, The Selecter and Chip are set to headline this year's Godiva in the City event, with tickets set to be available from 10am on Tuesday 23 June.

title: Major city-wide collaboration to drive new era for arts and culture in Coventry
summary: Working in partnership with Coventry University, Coventry City Council is pleased to be involved in the delivery of a major new initiative - Shape Coventry.
